methods.name: host_kind
methods.doc: The host kind this adapter is configured for.

methods.name: get_profile
methods.doc: Get the capability profile for this host kind.

methods.name: supports_streaming
methods.doc: Whether this host supports SSE streaming.

methods.name: supports_tool_async
methods.doc: Whether this host supports async tool execution.

methods.name: supports_file_write
methods.doc: Whether this host supports direct file system writes.

methods.name: get_execution_hints
methods.doc: Get execution hints for role runtime based on host capabilities.

capabilities.name: HostCapabilityProfile
capabilities.description: Capability profile for a given host kind.

capabilities.name: get_capability_profile
capabilities.description: Get the capability profile for a host kind.
